headline: Did TransDigm’s Earnings Beat, Guidance Hike, Deals and Buybacks Just Shift TDG’s Investment Narrative?
summary: In its latest fiscal quarter, TransDigm Group posted double-digit year-on-year revenue growth, beat earnings and operating income expectations, raised full-year revenue guidance, and completed acquisitions worth about US$3.16 billion funded in part by a US$2.00 billion debt raise. Management’s view that the current share price is a mispricing, reflected in more than US$100 million of buybacks alongside large aftermarket-focused acquisitions, offers a clear window into how TransDigm is...

headline: Is Boeing (BA) Now At An Attractive Price After Recent Safety Scrutiny?
summary: If you are wondering whether Boeing is attractively priced or still carries a premium, the recent share performance gives you some useful clues before looking at the detailed numbers. headline: U.S. Stock Futures Slide During Trump’s Address
summary: Futures tied to all three major indexes slid during President Trump’s remarks to the nation Wednesday night, chipping away at some of the strong gains of the past two days. Oil prices, which have moved counter to stocks lately, turned higher after notching losses during the earlier trading session.
